title: OSMM Brand Context Object
description: Durable, foundational Context: how a brand sounds, feels, and expresses itself — its personality, voice, tone, core messages, and the guardrails governing what it can and cannot say. Canonical schema for object_type 'brand_context'. The osmm-brand-context-builder skill references this file; it is the single source of truth for the object's shape.

osmm_version.description: OSMM schema version this instance conforms to (semantic version).

brand_context_id.description: Stable, human-readable id. Prefix 'BRC-' + lowercase hyphen slug, normally the same slug as the owning Business Context. Never changes once assigned.

version.description: Instance version (e.g. '1.0'). Bump on revision; the id stays stable.

name.description: Brand name. May differ from the legal company name in Business Context.

linked_business_context.description: Id of the owning Business Context Object. Use 'BIZ-PLACEHOLDER-<slug>' until it exists. Strongly recommended.

brand_promise.description: One sentence: the core idea/promise the brand stands for — its emotional/identity core, distinct from the business value proposition.

brand_archetype.description: Optional governed enum from the 12 brand archetypes. Pick the single closest; omit if the sources don't clearly support one.

brand_personality.description: 3-7 personality traits — who the brand is if it were a person. Adjectives or short phrases.

voice_principles.description: How the brand always speaks (durable) — principles, not adjectives. 3-6 items.

tone_principles.description: How tone flexes by situation/emotion (e.g. celebratory launch vs. service apology). 2-5 items.

tagline.description: Optional. The brand's tagline/slogan, if it has one.

messaging_pillars.description: The core, durable messages the brand repeats across campaigns. 2-5 items — enduring themes, not campaign copy.

vocabulary_preferred.description: Optional. Signature words/phrases the brand uses.

vocabulary_avoid.description: Optional. Words/phrases the brand deliberately avoids.

writing_dos.description: Optional. Concrete, actionable voice do's. Strongly encouraged for downstream operability.

messaging_guardrails.description: Non-negotiable message rules: claims that must always be made and claims that must never be made. Read by the creative-brief composer as guardrails.

mandatories.description: Optional. Required brand/legal elements every execution must carry (disclaimers, required phrasing, logo lockups).

compliance_notes.description: Optional. Regulated-industry or legal constraints on messaging.

visual_identity_notes.description: Optional. Brief note on visual identity as it affects marketing. Full design system is out of scope — link it via design_system_reference.

design_system_reference.description: Optional. Pointer to the brand's external design system / design language, if one exists. OSMM references this upstream system rather than modeling it.

source.description: One line: what source(s) this was built from and approximate date.
